title: The Static Cabin
setting: An isolated wooden cabin deep in the Pacific Northwest forest. The air is buzzing with solar radiation.

characters.name: The Hobbyist
characters.description: An amateur radio enthusiast who came here for the silence, but found something much louder.

items.name: Brass Oil Can
items.description: An old-fashioned oil can with a precision spout.

items.name: Hand Crank
items.description: A heavy iron T-handle for a manual winch.

items.name: Vacuum Tube
items.description: A glass 'glow-tube' from a high-power radio set.

items.name: Magnetic Keycard
items.description: A plain white card with a magnetic strip.

scenes.name: The Porch
scenes.prose: The screen door bangs rhythmically against the frame. A shimmering wall of grey static swallows the trees just ten feet from the steps. To the north, the heavy oak door leads into the main cabin. To the north, the jagged silhouette of the radio tower looms.

scenes.name: Main Room
scenes.prose: The cabin is filled with wood-grain and glowing vacuum tubes. A cast-iron stove sits in the corner. A wall of radio equipment hisses nearby. Above, a wooden trapdoor is sealed into the ceiling.

lookDescriptions.stove: An old Pioneer model. The door is fused.
lookDescriptions.ceiling-trapdoor: Leads to the crawlspace above. Missing a handle.

scenes.name: The Kitchenette
scenes.prose: A cramped corner smelling of woodsmoke. Shelves of canned goods line the walls. A heavy wooden trapdoor in the floor is secured by a thick padlock.

scenes.name: Attic Crawlspace
scenes.prose: The air is thick with dust and dry cedar. A single window looks out at the solar-flushed sky.

scenes.name: Root Cellar
scenes.prose: A cold, earth-walled room. The smell of stored potatoes and iron is sharp.

scenes.name: Radio Tower Base
scenes.prose: The ground is scorched black around the structure. The tower screams as it vibrates in the gale. A control-box is mounted to its base.

puzzles.result: You enter the cabin, escaping the static roar.
The door swings open, revealing a hand-crank in the ash.
The trapdoor drops, revealing the ladder to the attic.
The padlock snaps, revealing the cellar entrance.
The radio hums to life and ejects a magnetic-keycard.

winCondition.description: The reset sequence triggers. Reality stabilizes. The end.
